scripts.build: xcodebuild -project LorealClienteling.xcodeproj -scheme LorealClienteling -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -derivedDataPath ./build clean build | xcpretty || true
scripts.build:sim: xcodebuild -project LorealClienteling.xcodeproj -scheme LorealClienteling -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro,OS=latest' -derivedDataPath ./build build | xcpretty || true
scripts.test: xcodebuild -project LorealClienteling.xcodeproj -scheme LorealClienteling -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro,OS=latest' -derivedDataPath ./build test | xcpretty || true
scripts.clean: xcodebuild -project LorealClienteling.xcodeproj -scheme LorealClienteling clean && rm -rf build/
